title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at L&T Finance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at L&T Finance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
L&T Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About L&T Finance:
L&T Finance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Finance!
